candidate_summary: Pebble Time smartwatch 2015 Kickstarter preorder campaign; at the time the most-funded Kickstarter project ever.
observed_outcome_summary: Closed 2015-03-27 with $20,338,986 pledged by 78,471 backers (revealed preorder buyers). Pebble the company was later wound down and sold to Fitbit in Dec 2016 — strong launch buyer-action did not equal durable company success.
raw_outcome_evidence: Wikipedia 'Pebble (watch)', verbatim: 'At the end of the funding, March 27, 2015, Pebble Time received pledges of $20,338,986 from 78,471 backers.' (Operator-fetched 2026-05-31.)

action_signal_candidates.notes: 78,471 backers; $20,338,986 pledged. Tier-1 revealed preorder action.

reviewer_notes: Recommended evidence_tier=1 (Tier-1 preorder action verified). Recommended designation: TRAINING (known outcome => not a clean holdout). Human must map the four buckets; only the buyer numerator is observable.
uncertainty_flags: self_selected_denominator: backers/users are self-selected; the receptive/uncertain/skeptical proportions of the FULL addressable market are NOT externally observable
buyer_numerator_only: the action signal gives the buyer/action-positive count, not a four-bucket distribution
downstream_company_failure: Pebble shut down ~18 months later (sold to Fitbit 2016)
repeat_backers: some backers carried over from the 2012 Pebble campaign (correlated, not independent)
